summary: Iteration 14 testing completed successfully. Verified new LSTM + Monte Carlo forward simulation engine. All 6 portfolios have working simulation endpoints returning complete data with fan charts, distribution histograms, and risk metrics. Frontend Analytics page displays 'Forward Simulation Engine' section with 'LSTM + Monte Carlo' badge and 6 simulation cards. 42/42 backend tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok'}
Backend: GET /api/portfolios/simulation/{strategy_type} returns status='complete' for all 6 strategies
Backend: Simulation response contains lstm_forecast with method='lstm' and annualized_expected_return_pct
Backend: LSTM expected returns are clamped to reasonable bounds (not >100% annualized)
Backend: Simulation response contains monte_carlo.fan_chart with ~52 weekly data points
Backend: Fan chart points have p5/p25/p50/p75/p95/mean fields in correct order
Backend: Simulation response contains monte_carlo.distribution_chart (histogram bins)
Backend: Simulation response contains monte_carlo.risk_metrics with var_95_pct, cvar_95_pct, probability_of_profit_pct, expected_return_pct, max_expected_drawdown_pct
Backend: CVaR is correctly <= VaR (more extreme tail risk)
Backend: Simulation response contains monte_carlo.terminal_stats with mean_value, median_value, worst_case_value, best_case_value
Backend: Swing Trader shows negative expected return (-0.02%) reflecting weak strategy
Backend: All 6 simulations are cached and complete
Backend: Simulation metadata includes strategy, stocks_simulated, portfolio_value, simulation_horizon, computation_time_sec
Backend: Monte Carlo simulation_params shows n_paths=10000, horizon_days=252
Backend: Fan chart progression from day 0 to day 252 with correct initial value
Frontend: Analytics page loads with 'Portfolio Analytics' title
Frontend: 'Forward Simulation Engine' header visible
Frontend: 'LSTM + Monte Carlo' badge visible
Frontend: 6 simulation cards visible (value_stocks, long_term, bespoke_forward_looking, quick_entry, swing, alpha_generator)
Frontend: 6 fan charts visible with 1-Year Forward Projection
Frontend: 6 distribution histograms visible (Terminal Return Distribution)
Frontend: 6 risk metrics grids visible with VaR(95%), CVaR(95%), Max Exp DD, Median Return, Range(25-75), P(Profit)
Frontend: Fan chart legends show Median (cyan solid), Mean (amber dashed), 25-75th, 5-95th percentile bands
Frontend: Terminal value summary shows Worst/Median/Best values
Frontend: LSTM volatility and compute time displayed for each card
Frontend: Expected return badges show correct values (Value Stocks: +63.2%, Swing: -0.02%, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: LSTM model correctly implements ReturnLSTM with mu/log_sigma output for probabilistic forecasting
LSTM returns are properly clamped to ±0.002 daily (±50% annualized) to prevent hallucination
Monte Carlo uses GBM formula: S(t+1) = S(t) * exp((mu - sigma^2/2)*dt + sigma*sqrt(dt)*Z)
10,000 paths with 252-day horizon provides statistically robust simulation
Risk metrics correctly computed: VaR at 5th percentile, CVaR as mean of worst 5%
Simulation results cached in MongoDB with 12h TTL for performance
Background threading used for simulation computation to avoid blocking API
seed_data_creation: Simulation data cached for all 6 portfolios in portfolio_simulations collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified the LSTM + Monte Carlo forward simulation feature. Key findings: (1) All 6 portfolios have working simulation endpoints at /api/portfolios/simulation/{strategy_type}. (2) Simulation returns: lstm_forecast (method, annualized_expected_return_pct, annualized_volatility_pct), monte_carlo (fan_chart, distribution_chart, risk_metrics, terminal_stats, simulation_params). (3) Frontend shows simulation cards with fan charts (median cyan, mean amber dashed), distribution histograms, and risk metrics grid. (4) Swing Trader correctly shows negative expected return (-0.02%) reflecting weak strategy. (5) Simulation results are cached for 12h in portfolio_simulations collection.

response_fields: lstm_forecast: method, annualized_expected_return_pct, annualized_volatility_pct, historical_annual_return_pct, training_epochs, training_loss
monte_carlo.fan_chart: ~52 weekly points with day, week, p5, p25, p50, p75, p95, mean
monte_carlo.distribution_chart: histogram bins with return_pct, frequency
monte_carlo.risk_metrics: var_95_pct, cvar_95_pct, probability_of_profit_pct, expected_return_pct, max_expected_drawdown_pct, median_return_pct, return_range_25_75

components: Forward Simulation Engine header with 'LSTM + Monte Carlo' badge
Fan charts showing 1-Year Forward Projection with percentile bands
Median line (cyan solid) and Mean line (amber dashed)
Risk metrics grid: VaR(95%), CVaR(95%), Max Exp DD, Median Return, Range(25-75), P(Profit)
LSTM volatility and compute time display

lstm_model_review.output: Probabilistic (mu, log_sigma) for Gaussian return distribution
lstm_model_review.fallback: Uses historical stats if <90 data points for LSTM
